title: Girl Meets World
desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

title: Girl Meets World
desc: A coming-of-age comedy following Riley Matthews as she faces school, friendships, and life lessons with support from her parents Cory and Topanga in a heartwarming journey.
